item.title: 随着OSAT合作伙伴加大扩张力度，台积电的CoWoS产能仍然“极其紧张”
item.summary: During its July 16 earnings conference, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) offered an upbeat outlook on AI demand. Responding to competition from Intel's EMIB advanced packaging technology, chairman and CEO C.C. Wei said TSMC's CoWoS capacity remains "extremely tight" and welcomed the emergence of additi
